title: CV Support Session
summary: One-to-one help with CVs, applications, interviews, and practical work or college next steps before youth club starts.
eventDescription: One-to-one help with CVs, applications, interviews, and practical next steps in Rochdale.
trustNotes: Specific venue details can be shared on enquiry.
The session is designed to feel practical and calm rather than intimidating.
Safeguarding and privacy routes stay visible throughout the session journey.
You can ask before attending if you are unsure what to bring or whether the session fits.
featureBullets: Bring what you already have, even if that is a draft CV, unfinished application, interview question, blank document, or first question.
Work through applications, wording, structure, interview preparation, and the next practical step.
Leave with something clearer and more usable than when you arrived.
seoDescription: Join EncouragingYou's Saturday CV support session in Rochdale for one-to-one help with CVs, applications, interviews, and practical next steps.
